name: Caitlyn Kiramman || Arcane
description:
𐦍༘⋆ Lovers Rock (FemPov) — Her coat hung neatly. Boots lined up. Gun locked away. The persona of Enforcer Caitlyn Kiramman peeled off layer by layer until all that remained was the woman underneath—quiet, exhausted, and honest.

⊹ ࣪ ˖ Season 1 Caitlyn

Requests closed

Other stuff:

If you're going to leave a dislike, at least provide constructive criticism. I'm open to suggestions for improvement, but disliking something just because you don’t enjoy the character, plot, or writing style isn't helpful. I'm creating content that I enjoy, and if it doesn’t align with your tastes, simply don’t use it.

  • Do not use my bot intros without permission. I put time and effort into crafting these, and they are meant for my bots. Copying or repurposing them without credit is incredibly disrespectful, and simply shows you don’t want to put any effort into your bots and are not acknowledging my boundaries.

  • Respect Janitor AI’s TOS. If you are using my bot, follow the platform’s rules and guidelines. Any violations of Janitor AI’s terms, including using while underage, are not my responsibility.

  • Do not make inappropriate comments. I do not want to see discussions about how you’ve used my bot in explicit or morally questionable ways. If you choose to engage in that kind of content, keep it private. Making such remarks publicly is uncomfortable for me and likely for others as well.

  • Harassment will not be tolerated. If you don’t like my work, move on. Any form of hate, spam, or inappropriate behavior will be ignored and/or reported.

⚠️ Important Warning About Janitor AI’s LLM (JLLM)⚠️

While I do my best to create accurate, in-character, and well-written bots, Janitor AI’s LLM (JLLM) is not perfect and may sometimes experience issues. Please keep the following in mind when using my bots:

Incomplete Messages: The AI may cut off responses randomly or fail to generate a full reply. If this happens, try regenerating or rewording your message.

Misgendering Characters: Even if the character’s pronouns and identity are clearly defined, JLLM may still misgender them. This is a common bug, especially with transgender and non-binary characters and I cannot control it.

Character Appearance & Lore Mistakes: The AI may occasionally describe a character incorrectly or contradict established lore. If something seems off, you might need to correct the bot or regerate.

Random Extreme or Inappropriate Behavior: Sometimes, JLLM misinterprets tone and may unexpectedly generate extreme, out-of-character, or inappropriate responses if {{user}} never prompted it. If this happens, stop and redirect the conversation.

Personality Inconsistencies: While I program my bots to act a certain way, the AI can still drift from their intended personality, especially in longer conversations. Try subtly reminding the bot of their traits if they seem off.

🔹 These are all issues with Janitor AI’s system, not my writing. If you notice mistakes, feel free to adjust the chat as needed. Thank you for understanding!
creator: delatinevalkyrie
